missingnessPolicy.SOFR_EFFR_MONTHLY_MAX: absent before source coverage; never backfilled or zero-imputed
missingnessPolicy.eligibility: reported per fold and task; insufficient coverage makes the fold ineligible

compositionPolicy: No fused regime candidate until both task-specific candidates are frozen and evaluated independently.
selectionPolicy: Nested inner rolling validation only; outer OOS cannot select, rank or tune.
promotionPolicy: Passing a task gate can only produce ELIGIBLE_FOR_SHADOW_REVIEW; operational approval requires fresh prospective Evidence v2 and human review.
